name: acp_performance_audit
description: Suede Labs deep audit of an ACP seller agent's offerings inventory, pricing, SLAs, and visible jobs history. Returns a structured markdown memo with executive summary, per-offering grades, pricing analysis, demand-signal read, ranked findings, and a 30-day action plan. Best for sellers tuning a struggling agent, ops teams running quarterly reviews, and ACP investors evaluating an agent before promotion. Slower and deeper than agent_quick_score — same input shape, more rigor.

agent_url.description: Public Virtuals/Bazaar URL for the seller agent being audited.

agent_uuid.description: Optional ACP agent UUID. Provide if the URL alone may be ambiguous.

focus_areas.description: Optional list of focus areas the audit should weight heavily (e.g. 'pricing', 'sla', 'copy', 'discoverability', 'fulfillment-quality').

notes.description: Optional context from the requester — known issues, recent changes, or specific questions.

examples.notes: Job conversion dropped 40% after recent re-list.
